{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021925A7887DCAD75C0D594B62"}"},"total":92},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581668130238726974","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本还是不错的，没有低调控分高中竞赛，从初中就展示天赋直接科大少年班，比高中才发力合理多了，太多不敢写低龄天才的作者了，但是实际这本主角才稍微符合现实，而且还保守了，天赋这东西差距太大了。系统最多还是辅助。娱乐方面不要看别的差评就直接走，主角最多参加个校园晚会唱喝，从头到尾就抄了首稻香，挺符合校园生活的，主要国外好多大佬都精通各种乐器，主角这真不算啥。整体还是学术创业报国，而且越写越好，前期一些小毒点读者提醒后面直接就神隐掉，速速更新，最好加点网上评论，类似的宣传，后面爽感有点差"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765248596,"group_id":"7538351229999516734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"被光选中的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9yefwhrLA5tL3D7Gu1VxEM3dG5M/BL5B2ul8CUzmQeU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4072223463718295","user_name":"7长生不死7"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4072223463718295","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1791033591,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7538351229999516734","book_info":{"abstract":"某档科技访谈节目上，著名主持人对着镜头开始了凡尔赛：“说实话，我当年没参加高考.....因为被保送了北大。”
台下掌声雷动，主持人得意地挑眉，看向身边的嘉宾：“向阳博士，您当年是......”
向阳放下手里的水杯，淡淡一笑：“哦，我没读过高中。”
没读过高中怎么了，谁还不是个博士？
系统+学霸+创业+抢夺机缘+小爽文","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocd8d873f81afe65c0b8a3e079aac4e48~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清风明月依旧在","author_id":"","book_id":"7538351229999516734","book_name":"少年班里走出的院士","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303850","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538351388670050878","read_count":"13796","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"907351"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"427","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb9ad46a511a4acfeea8e4d41291d8fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387565&x-signature=5nzRlMpOVQUPCP0XoI0wSzoMbaI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"87442213726","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"251"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021925A7887DCAD75C0D594B62"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7153,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7151},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574080765472195352","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"越往后越好看，可能作者前面还没列好大纲，东一榔头西一棒子的。后面就比较纯粹了，但也没纯理论，而是应用理论两头抓。
值得一提的是，作者抓的东西很多，哪个领域都想掺一下。目前我已经看到很多东西了，比如电池，无人机，孪生素数......有好有坏，不过作者也算下了很大一番功夫。
另外期待主角有更多灵光一闪的时候，而这也是理科最让人着迷的地方——我们都在渴望，灵感的降临。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763480461,"group_id":"7538351229999516734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8nOGZ34390O46LoLnQsCN8gwCb4YD/HDo9kLT8kibba","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3666245411157764","user_name":"用户名53978241"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3666245411157764","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7538351229999516734","book_info":{"abstract":"某档科技访谈节目上，著名主持人对着镜头开始了凡尔赛：“说实话，我当年没参加高考.....因为被保送了北大。”

向阳放下手里的水杯，淡淡一笑：“哦，我没读过高中。”
